title: Seattle Art Day
text: Visit Seattle Art Museum and Museum of Pop Culture for weather-proof indoor activities.

title: Waterfront Walk
text: Pike Place, Olympic Sculpture Park, and waterfront walking route for clear weather.

title: Budget Eats
text: Use food halls, public transit, and city passes to keep total costs low.

title: Rain Backup
text: Swap outdoor blocks with coffee roastery tour and aquarium if rain probability is high.

title: Nature Option
text: Discovery Park loop and Gas Works Park are low-cost outdoor options.
